flags: Single UBO — sole beneficial owner Zdenka Krizanova controls the company
Prior ex-offo deletion in 2017 — initial RPVS entry was removed for non-compliance, but company re-registered under new entry the same year

summary: DREVEX EU, s.r.o. (ICO 36835463) is actively registered in the RPVS under entry 17829 with status Platny (valid). The sole declared UBO (konecny uzivatel vyhod) is Zdenka Krizanova (born 06.04.1969, Diviacka Nova Ves). The authorized person handling RPVS compliance is SOSKA LEGAL s. r. o. (ICO 56940688, Zilina). The most recent annual verification was completed on 09.01.2026. No fines or qualified complaints have been recorded. An earlier RPVS entry (7426) was deleted ex offo on 13.10.2017 due to failure to re-register under the new law, but the company promptly re-registered under the current entry on 03.08.2017.
